offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient contract management causes missed discounts. We provide a streamlined procurement contract management system instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Etsy sellers face challenges in managing vendor contracts effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
